title: 皐月賞の後に・忠犬大激走！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Victory unexpectedly goes to Meisho Doto at the
Satsuki Sho. She's even defeated T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overwhelmed by surprise, Meisho Doto can
hardly utter a word. She collapses, having
exhausted her stamina and vitality.
